title: Lana, Queen of the Amazons
writer: Ernst von Hasselbach, Géza von Cziffra, Cyl Farney
actors: Catherine Schell, Michael Hinz, Anton Diffring
plot: A scientist and his nephew are hosts of Lana, queen of the Amazons. Meanwhile, other white men penetrate the Brazilian jungle, wishing to find and take the legendary Amazons' treasure.
